goal: FAZ 0 + FAZ 1: Asset pipeline + Vite/React/TS iskelet — boş ama deploy edilebilir uygulama

tasks.title: Asset envanteri + sprite/audio listele
tasks.description: Unity projesinden Assets/ExtraPackage/{Sprites,Audio} altındaki tüm dosyaları say, oyun bazında grupla, asset-inventory.json üret

tasks.title: Sprite WebP + atlas pipeline scripti
tasks.description: scripts/asset-pipeline/sprites.ts — PNG→WebP (cwebp -q 80), TexturePacker CLI ile oyun bazlı atlas + JSON descriptor

tasks.title: Audio OGG+MP3 pipeline scripti
tasks.description: scripts/asset-pipeline/audio.ts — ffmpeg ile WAV/MP3→OGG+MP3 çift format

tasks.title: ScriptableObject → game-database.json çevirici
tasks.description: Unity .asset (YAML) parser → src/data/games/game-database.json (id, name, intelligences, hashtags)

tasks.title: Vite + React + TS + Tailwind iskelet
tasks.description: npm create vite@latest .; phaser zustand gsap react-i18next firebase howler tailwindcss kurulumu; eslint+prettier+vitest config

tasks.title: Klasör mimarisi + IMiniGame interface + MiniGameBase
tasks.description: ROADMAP §1.2-1.4 — src/{core,data,firebase,games/_base,components,store} + types.ts + MiniGameBase abstract class (10-move kuralı)

tasks.title: Firebase config + Auth servisleri (TS)
tasks.description: google-services.json oku → firebase/config.ts; Google/Email/Anonymous sign-in fonksiyonları; auth state subscription

tasks.title: Capacitor + Tauri kurulum (skeleton)
tasks.description: capacitor add android ios + tauri init — boş web app build → APK + macOS/Win/Linux executable çıkabilmeli

tasks.title: Jira projesi MMKG aç + ROADMAP fazlarını epic olarak gir
tasks.description: Jira MMKG projesi; FAZ 0-10 epic olarak; sprint-1 task'larını story olarak link
